macros.token:
**OPSIN: Open Parser for Systematic IUPAC Nomenclature**
OPSIN converts IUPAC names of chemical compounds to SMILES representations.
**Inputs**
- A plain text file with one IUPAC name per line, **or** - A tabular file with a column containing IUPAC names (select the column using the column selector).
**Outputs**
- If the input is a plain text file, the output is an SMI file with one SMILES per line. - If the input is a tabular file, the output is the same tabular file with a new ``SMILES`` column appended.
Names that cannot be parsed will result in an empty SMILES string for that entry.
**References**
- Lowe, D. M., Corbett, P. T., Murray-Rust, P., & Glen, R. C. (2011). Chemical Name to Structure: OPSIN, an Open Source Solution. *Journal of Chemical Information and Modeling*, 51(3), 739-753. https://doi.org/10.1021/ci100384d
